title: LifecycleDefinition
description: Schema for agent lifecycle definitions in the OpenCode lifecycle engine

type.description: Lifecycle execution strategy: linear (sequential phases), dag (directed acyclic graph), generic (arbitrary transitions)

phases.description: Ordered list of phases in the lifecycle

description.description: Human-readable description of the phase purpose

allowedTools.description: Tool names allowed during this phase — empty or omitted means all tools allowed

fanOut.description: If true, spawn subagents in parallel

subagents.description: Subagents to spawn during this phase (for fan-out phases)

requiresAll.description: If true, all subagents must complete before proceeding

escalation.description: Escalation strategy when maxRetries exhausted: blocker (stop and report), skip (continue with phase skipped), abort (stop immediately with failure)

condition.description: Condition under which the transition fires: only on success, only on failure, or always
